[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly surge in freight logistics RSS counts on delayed container ships",
    "family": "freight_logistics",
    "data": {
      "source": "public RSS feeds on maritime freight delays",
      "type": "rss_count",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "Spike in news mentioning container ship delays signals supply chain stress that pressures industrial production timelines.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLI",
      "rationale": "Industrial sector earnings are sensitive to freight bottlenecks and delayed shipments."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "If weekly RSS count on container delay keywords increases 30% over prior week",
      "exit": "After 3 weeks or when RSS count normalizes below 10% above baseline",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Freight delays news volume fluctuates weekly due to port congestion and weather events."
  },
